I spent all day frantically calling dentist offices, even went into some and waited, just to be told no one could help me. I cried literally every second I thought about it. Emergency Dentist Dr James W DunnAvant.name: Gerald Mitchell
Emergency Dentist Dr James W DunnAvant.text: Outstanding service. Great communication throughout. Called when my plane landed, and Doc was on his way to my hotel as fast as I was. Mobile dental unit was pretty cool. Took care of me quick and easy. Highly recommended.
